textByHash.1ad8241b1aca7d5a4a18e29fc1c43329daaa8102: There you go, 20 free dynamite. Return tomorrow for some more.
textByHash.25fbf78a8c0abb5f293cb7eb0db5100c1bd6c506: There you go, 80 free dynamite. Return tomorrow for some more.
textByHash.4cf9bf07fbbf435712fa828f550f9ff5bdef05fc: Sorry, human, I'm afraid you need more of a reputation in Lovakengj before I can sell you anything.
textByHash.85fde086fde80b4563f7c69ba9b0107ee4967b09: If you're looking for dynamite, you've come to the right place, human.
textByHash.93ed17d17d2c1945d73e8b479f717a3e5094a311: Now, can I help you today?
textByHash.aea65d0a37e8f1b34ff654e016a85351d229740f: There you go, 40 free dynamite. Return tomorrow for some more.
textByHash.b3d3ca855bf79b83a2aeb1dc7d78fa8626f8e775: The name's Thirus Urkar. The Urkars have supplied the blast mines with the finest dynamite since they opened many ages ago.
textByHash.d66f417f1517292e936d12c3f836103075e3ce8f: I've already given you your free allowance for today. Come back to me tomorrow for some more.
